name: @aqua/plugin-aqua-resources
description: Aqua portal Aqua-phase resource shelf — collections of SOPs / Incubator modules / tutorials / videos / links, filterable by phase. Seeded with 5 default collections (Incubator Modules · Personal AI Assistants · AquaSuite GHL Tutorial · My Business OS Tutorial · Where Time Is No Longer Tied To Income). Pairs with @aqua/plugin-sops for live SOP refs; T4 Incubator consumes the read endpoint.
